label: Cistern Ledger Room
description: Cistern Ledger Room serves as Gleamweld Atelier’s sealed storage for raw silicate blanks, prism offcuts, and charge-sensitive fittings awaiting assembly. Faceted vitrified tile lines the walls in tight ribs, while grounded shelving stands above a narrow floor trench that carries glittering runoff toward a lidded cistern mouth. Copper-white light enters through a shuttered clerestory slit and breaks across numbered canisters, turning the inventory marks into crisp bands of reflected twilight. The air remains dry and faintly metallic, defined by insulated seals that suppress static bloom from Lacrymara’s glass-dust fallouts.
